name: tal
description: Tal's personal helpers: commit, PR feedback, App Store Connect, and partial-commit staging.

interface.shortDescription: Personal helpers for commits, PR feedback, and App Store Connect.
interface.longDescription: Reusable workflows for atomic and quick commits, PR review feedback, inline PR thread replies, App Store Connect / TestFlight tooling, and partial-commit line staging.
defaultPrompt: Prepare an atomic commit from the changes in this repo.
Fetch the review feedback on PR #123 and summarize what needs addressing.
Reply to that PR review thread inline.
